title: Nettork Client
description: This mod pack is made to play PVP and have more fps than normal, if you look at my page, I made an even better one for performance but less for PVP.
body:
**Nettork Client** _is a PVP based modpack for pretty good pc's, if you would like an optimized version I would suggest to vist my profile and get the LITE version!_

**NC** _Adds all the LEGAL PVP mods that help you get information about your current loot. This modpack is aimed at those who play competitively and not casual. I carefully added ceratain mods to get the best competitive experience._

**If you have any question you can join [The Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qWFmWK865D) and you can easily ask questions to the upcoming community.**


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>
Cloth Config API - It's a Dependencie for another mod

  BetterHurtCam - It removes the screen shake animation

Dynamic FPS - It lowers your FPS when the window isn't active

Entity Culling - It doesn't render entites that you can't see

Fabric API - It's a Dependencie for another mod

Fabric Language Kotlin - It's a Dependencie for another mod

Ferritcore - It reduces memory usage in different ways

Immediatelyfast - It improves the immediate mode rendering performance of the client

Indium - It's an addon to Sodium for rendering optimization

LazyDFU - It defers unnecessary initialization work so that it is only performed if required

Lithium - It improves a number of systems

ModernFix - It reduces memory usage

More Culling - it changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance

Sodium - It is a powerful rendering engine and optimization mod for Minecraft 1.16+

PlaceHolder API - It's a Dependencie for another mod

Tiertagger - It shows the tier of someone in any mctiers catagory

TotemCounter - It shows how many totems you have left and how many pops you popped

YACL - It's a Dependecie for another mod

Zoomify - It adds a zoom feature just like Optifine

Armor Hud - It shows the durability of your armor

PVP Legacy Utils - It is made for the server PvP Legacy to give you a better experience

Sodium Options - It gives you cleaner setting options

Sodium Extra - It gives all the secret Optifine options

Ukulib - It is a Dependicie for all her mods

3D Skin Layers - It makes all skins look much better

Apple Skin - It shows you how much saturation a certain food will give

Better Shield - It adds the color red when the shield is disabled and fixs sounds

Capes - It lets you use many capes from diferent providers

Chat Heads - It shows you the head of a skin of the person talking

Emoji Type - It lets you use emojis with :

Essential Mod - It lets you chat to your friends and other essential mods

Health Indicator - It gives you a sound when you are getting low

Iris Shaders - It lets you use shaders just like Optifine

Mod Menu - It lets you set up your mods and see your mods


</details>
